prompt:
Subject: Stone steps in green shade

Main: A vertical 2:3 full-body portrait. An adult woman with a model-like physique is sitting on the stone steps of an old residential alley surrounded by greenery. The person is positioned slightly right of center, captured from head to toe, occupying about 55% of the screen. A wide space is left on the left for the depth of the alley and plants.

Person/Expression: A natural and elegant Japanese adult woman. Long slender limbs and well-proportioned features. Dark brown hair close to black tied in a high, rough bun, leaving thin bangs and strands around the face. Transparent natural skin, light pink-beige makeup. Head tilted slightly left, shoulders relaxed, looking at the camera with a gentle smile.

Outfit/Pose: An ivory-colored ribbed top with thin shoulder straps. Small buttons lined up vertically on the front, with the top two undone to create a natural V-line. Paired with light blue high-waisted denim shorts and white slender flat sandals. Leaning back and right shoulder lightly against an old wall, with hands folded on her knees. Legs stretched diagonally toward the bottom left, one foot slightly forward. Naturally expresses contact between clothes and body, weight on the seat, and overlapping legs.

Background/Light: A quiet Japanese residential alley covered in ivy and dark green leaves. Features old concrete walls, stone benches with steps, bamboo blinds, small unglazed pots, and white flower pots. Dense ivy on the right and top, soft bokeh of large leaves in the left foreground, and the narrow alley in the background softly blurred. Natural summer light shines from the top left, casting fine dappled sunlight through the leaves onto the face, shoulders, arms, and legs. Shadows stretch softly toward the bottom right, with pale reflected light from the surrounding greenery hitting the skin.

Composition/Camera: Vertical, medium long shot including the full body. Camera at a slightly higher position than eye level, nearly frontal. Natural compression equivalent to 85mm, shallow depth of field. Clear focus on the face and upper body, with foreground leaves and the distant alley smoothly blurred. Leaf arch at the top, deep negative space on the left, and sufficient space for legs and stone steps at the bottom.

Texture/Style: Clean, realistic summer fashion photography. Carefully depicts natural skin texture, delicate hair, ribbed material, faded denim, old concrete, and even the veins of ivy leaves. Saturation is somewhat restrained, centered on deep green, ivory, and light blue. Soft film grain, gentle contrast, natural highlights.

Negative: Unnatural face, unnatural gaze, extra fingers, missing fingers, fused limbs, joint breakdowns, unnatural leg length, clothing digging into skin, unnatural gravity, shadows inconsistent with light source, excessive skin correction, plastic-like skin, text, logos, watermarks.

promptZh:
主体：绿荫下的石阶

主要内容：2:3 纵向全身肖像。一位拥有模特般身材的成年女性坐在长满绿植的老式住宅巷弄石阶上。人物位于画面中心偏右位置，全身入镜，约占画面 55% 的比例。左侧留出宽阔空间，以展现巷弄的纵深感和植物。

人物/表情：自然且优雅的 日本成年女性。四肢修长，五官比例匀称。深棕色近乎黑色的长发扎成高高的随性发髻，留有稀疏的刘海和脸颊两侧的发丝。通透的自然肤质，淡粉米色系妆容。头部微微向左倾斜，双肩放松，对着镜头露出温柔的微笑。

服装/姿势：一件象牙色细肩带罗纹上衣。正面垂直排列着小纽扣，上方两颗解开，自然形成 V 领。搭配 浅蓝色高腰牛仔短裤 和白色细带平底凉鞋。身体后仰，右肩轻靠在老旧墙面上，双手交叠放在膝盖上。双腿向左下方斜向伸展，一只脚微微向前。自然呈现衣物与身体的接触感、坐姿的重心以及双腿的交叠姿态。

背景/光影：一条被常春藤和深绿色叶片覆盖的宁静日本住宅巷弄。包含老旧混凝土墙、带台阶的石凳、竹帘、小型素烧花盆和白色花盆。右侧和顶部覆盖着茂密的常春藤，左侧前景有大叶片的柔和虚化，背景中狭窄的巷弄呈现柔焦效果。夏季自然光从左上方射入，透过叶片在脸部、肩部、手臂和腿部投下细腻的斑驳阳光。阴影柔和地向右下方延伸，周围绿植反射的淡光映照在皮肤上。

构图/摄影：纵向，包含全身的中远景。相机位置略高于视线水平，近乎正面拍摄。等效 85mm 镜头的自然压缩感，浅景深。焦点清晰对准脸部和上半身，前景叶片和远处的巷弄平滑虚化。顶部有叶片形成的拱形，左侧留有充足的负空间，底部留有足够的腿部和石阶空间。

质感/风格：干净、写实的夏季时尚摄影。细致描绘了自然的皮肤纹理、细腻的发丝、罗纹材质、褪色的牛仔布、老旧混凝土，甚至常春藤叶片的脉络。饱和度略微克制，以深绿、象牙白和浅蓝色为主调。柔和的胶片颗粒感，温和的对比度，自然的高光。

负面提示词：不自然的脸部、不自然的视线、多余的手指、缺失的手指、肢体融合、关节崩坏、不自然的腿长、衣物勒入皮肤、不符合重力规律、阴影与光源不一致、过度磨皮、塑料感皮肤、文字、Logo、水印。
